# informativeText()

**Instance Method**

Returns the informative text currently displayed in the panel.

## Declaration

```swift
func informativeText() -> String!
```

## Customizing the Appearance of the Sheet or Panel

- **setAlternateButtonTitle(_:)**: Customizes the title of the alternate button.
- **setDefaultButtonTitle(_:)**: Customizes the title of the default button.
- **setPolicies(_:)**: Specifies one or more policies that apply to the displayed certificates.
- **policies()**: Returns an array of policies used to evaluate the status of the displayed certificates.
- **setInformativeText(_:)**: Sets the optional informative text displayed in the panel.
